Use this health checklist to analyze the success of your campaigns…
Troubleshooting
What to do when your campaign isn’t working:
• Not getting impressions? Adjust your bidding (or duplicate and
restart your campaign)
• Not getting clicks? Adjust your targeting, ad copy, and/or creative

2
Module 5 Summary Notes
• Not getting action on the page? Optimize your ad scent and/or
landing page
• Still not getting results? Let’s go back to your offer
Scaling
Here are the different types of scaling and what to do when scaling IS
working...
Vertical Scaling: Increasing your budget for scale
Horizontal Scaling: Showing your ad to more people in the market
Scaling vertically…
• Increase your budget no more than 50% every 7 days
• Do not scale your ad past the point of no return (and quit increasing
the budget after you’ve reached this threshold)
Scaling horizontally…
• This is the most effective way to scale as it can literally go on “forever”
• Remember that your market is a revolving door
• Leverage other interests and lookalike audiences
